name: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them into 4-5 pieces each.
2. Place the potatoes and garlic in a medium pot with enough water to cover them and add 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
3. Bring to a boil, then simmer until tender.
4. Remove the potatoes and drain.
5. Add cream to the pot containing the cooked potatoes and return to a boil.
6. Return the potatoes and garlic to the pot with the remaining salt, pepper, and butter.
7. Puree the potatoes using a food mill.
